# @stapel/auth-react 1.0.0

Headless React flow pair for stapel-auth (contract >=0.5 <0.6) — business + state, zero visual opinion.
Built on @stapel/core: typed client + StapelApiError envelope, auth token refresh,
verification-403 interception, i18n engine, analytics facade, TanStack Query layer.

## The one right way (do this, the rest is a review/lint smell)
- No raw fetch/axios. The client is injected via <AuthProvider>/StapelConfigProvider;
  every hook and flow already carries auth, refresh, and the error envelope.
- Render errors, never try/catch them: a flow's state carries FlowError{code,params};
  render `t(code, params)` and branch on `explainAuthError(code)` remediation.
- Server state = the use* hooks (query layer); keys come only from authQueryKeys.
- User strings = i18n keys (registerAuthI18n); never string literals.
- Sign-in UI = a headless flow component; copy it (shadcn-style) to restyle.

## Layers
api (typed client) · model (hooks, session) · flows (machines) · headless · i18n

## Machines (createFlowMachine; analytics funnel flow.<id>.<step>)
- createAnonymousFlow
- createAuthenticatorChangeFlow
- createMagicLinkFlow
- createOAuthFlow
- createOtpFlow
- createPasskeyLoginFlow
- createPasskeyRegistrationFlow
- createPasswordChangeFlow
- createPasswordLoginFlow
- createPasswordResetFlow
- createQrLoginFlow
- createSsoFlow
- createTotpSetupFlow
- createVerificationController

## Documented flows (flows.json — canonical id, steps, endpoints)
- auth.password_login: POST /auth/api/password/login/, POST /auth/api/totp/challenge/verify/
- auth.passwordless_login: POST /auth/api/email/request/, POST /auth/api/email/verify/
- auth.step_up_verification: GET /auth/api/verification/<str:challenge_id>/, POST /auth/api/verification/<str:challenge_id>/initiate/, POST /auth/api/verification/<str:challenge_id>/complete/, GET /auth/api/verification/preferences/, PUT /auth/api/verification/preferences/

## Operations (typed; use the named op, never a path string)
Request/response schema names are in manifest.json + the generated types.
- auth_api_admin_audit_retrieve: GET /auth/api/admin/audit/
- auth_api_admin_users_create: POST /auth/api/admin-users/
- auth_api_anonymous_create: POST /auth/api/anonymous/
- auth_api_capabilities_retrieve: GET /auth/api/capabilities/
- auth_api_email_change_delayed_cancel_create: POST /auth/api/email/change/delayed/cancel/
- auth_api_email_change_delayed_initiate_create: POST /auth/api/email/change/delayed/initiate/
- auth_api_email_change_delayed_status_retrieve: GET /auth/api/email/change/delayed/status/
- auth_api_email_change_instant_request_new_create: POST /auth/api/email/change/instant/request-new/
- auth_api_email_change_instant_request_old_create: POST /auth/api/email/change/instant/request-old/
- auth_api_email_change_instant_verify_new_create: POST /auth/api/email/change/instant/verify-new/
- auth_api_email_change_instant_verify_old_create: POST /auth/api/email/change/instant/verify-old/
- auth_api_email_request_create: POST /auth/api/email/request/
- auth_api_email_verify_create: POST /auth/api/email/verify/
- auth_api_gdpr_schema_retrieve: GET /auth/api/gdpr/schema/
- auth_api_logout_create: POST /auth/api/logout/
- auth_api_logout_retrieve: GET /auth/api/logout/
- auth_api_magic_request_create: POST /auth/api/magic/request/
- auth_api_magic_verify_retrieve: GET /auth/api/magic/verify/
- auth_api_me_retrieve: GET /auth/api/me/
- auth_api_oauth_authorize_retrieve: GET /auth/api/oauth/{provider}/authorize/
- auth_api_oauth_callback_retrieve: GET /auth/api/oauth/{provider}/callback
- auth_api_oauth_callback_retrieve_2: GET /auth/api/oauth/{provider}/callback/
- auth_api_oauth_login_create: POST /auth/api/oauth/login/
- auth_api_oauth2_introspect_create: POST /auth/api/oauth2/introspect/
- auth_api_passkey_authenticate_begin_create: POST /auth/api/passkey/authenticate/begin/
- auth_api_passkey_authenticate_complete_create: POST /auth/api/passkey/authenticate/complete/
- auth_api_passkey_destroy: DELETE /auth/api/passkey/{id}/
- auth_api_passkey_register_begin_create: POST /auth/api/passkey/register/begin/
- auth_api_passkey_register_complete_create: POST /auth/api/passkey/register/complete/
- auth_api_passkey_retrieve: GET /auth/api/passkey/
- auth_api_password_change_create: POST /auth/api/password/change/
- auth_api_password_change_otp_request_create: POST /auth/api/password/change/otp/request/
- auth_api_password_change_otp_verify_create: POST /auth/api/password/change/otp/verify/
- auth_api_password_login_create: POST /auth/api/password/login/
- auth_api_password_methods_retrieve: GET /auth/api/password/methods/
- auth_api_password_register_create: POST /auth/api/password/register/
- auth_api_password_reset_email_request_create: POST /auth/api/password/reset/email/request/
- auth_api_password_reset_email_verify_create: POST /auth/api/password/reset/email/verify/
- auth_api_password_reset_phone_request_create: POST /auth/api/password/reset/phone/request/

- auth_api_phone_change_instant_request_new_create: POST /auth/api/phone/change/instant/request-new/
- auth_api_phone_change_instant_request_old_create: POST /auth/api/phone/change/instant/request-old/
- auth_api_phone_change_instant_verify_new_create: POST /auth/api/phone/change/instant/verify-new/
- auth_api_phone_change_instant_verify_old_create: POST /auth/api/phone/change/instant/verify-old/
- auth_api_phone_request_create: POST /auth/api/phone/request/
- auth_api_phone_verify_create: POST /auth/api/phone/verify/
- auth_api_qr_confirm_create: POST /auth/api/qr/{key}/confirm/
- auth_api_qr_generate_create: POST /auth/api/qr/generate/
- auth_api_qr_reject_create: POST /auth/api/qr/{key}/reject/
- auth_api_qr_scan_retrieve: GET /auth/api/qr/{key}/scan/
- auth_api_qr_status_retrieve: GET /auth/api/qr/{key}/status/
- auth_api_security_audit_retrieve: GET /auth/api/security/audit/
- auth_api_security_revoke_suspicious_retrieve: GET /auth/api/security/revoke-suspicious/
- auth_api_security_status_retrieve: GET /auth/api/security/status/
- auth_api_service_keys_create: POST /auth/api/service-keys
- auth_api_service_keys_destroy: DELETE /auth/api/service-keys/{id}
- auth_api_service_keys_list: GET /auth/api/service-keys
- auth_api_service_keys_partial_update: PATCH /auth/api/service-keys/{id}
- auth_api_service_keys_retrieve: GET /auth/api/service-keys/{id}
- auth_api_service_keys_update: PUT /auth/api/service-keys/{id}
- auth_api_sessions_confirm_create: POST /auth/api/sessions/{session_id}/confirm/
- auth_api_sessions_destroy: DELETE /auth/api/sessions/
- auth_api_sessions_destroy_2: DELETE /auth/api/sessions/{session_id}/
- auth_api_sessions_list: GET /auth/api/sessions/
- auth_api_sso_login_retrieve: GET /auth/api/sso/{slug}/login/
- auth_api_sso_lookup_retrieve: GET /auth/api/sso/lookup/
- auth_api_sso_oidc_callback_retrieve: GET /auth/api/sso/{slug}/oidc/callback/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_config_partial_update: PATCH /auth/api/sso/orgs/{slug}/config/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_config_update: PUT /auth/api/sso/orgs/{slug}/config/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_create: POST /auth/api/sso/orgs/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_destroy: DELETE /auth/api/sso/orgs/{slug}/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_list: GET /auth/api/sso/orgs/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_partial_update: PATCH /auth/api/sso/orgs/{slug}/
- auth_api_sso_orgs_retrieve: GET /auth/api/sso/orgs/{slug}/
- auth_api_sso_saml_acs_create: POST /auth/api/sso/{slug}/saml/acs/
- auth_api_sso_saml_metadata_retrieve: GET /auth/api/sso/{slug}/saml/metadata/
- auth_api_token_create: POST /auth/api/token/
- auth_api_token_refresh_create: POST /auth/api/token/refresh/
- auth_api_token_refresh_retrieve: GET /auth/api/token/refresh/
- auth_api_totp_challenge_verify_create: POST /auth/api/totp/challenge/verify/
- auth_api_totp_disable_create: POST /auth/api/totp/disable/
- auth_api_totp_disable_otp_request_create: POST /auth/api/totp/disable-otp/request/
- auth_api_totp_setup_confirm_create: POST /auth/api/totp/setup/confirm/
- auth_api_totp_setup_create: POST /auth/api/totp/setup/
- auth_api_totp_step_up_create: POST /auth/api/totp/step-up/
- auth_api_user_account_cancel_close_create: POST /auth/api/user/account/cancel-close
- auth_api_user_account_close_create: POST /auth/api/user/account/close
- auth_api_user_account_close_status_retrieve: GET /auth/api/user/account/close/status

- auth_api_user_data_export_download_retrieve: GET /auth/api/user/data-export/download
- auth_api_user_data_export_request_create: POST /auth/api/user/data-export/request
- auth_api_user_data_export_status_retrieve: GET /auth/api/user/data-export/status
- auth_api_verification_complete_create: POST /auth/api/verification/{challenge_id}/complete/
- auth_api_verification_initiate_create: POST /auth/api/verification/{challenge_id}/initiate/
- auth_api_verification_preferences_retrieve: GET /auth/api/verification/preferences/
- auth_api_verification_preferences_update: PUT /auth/api/verification/preferences/
- auth_api_verification_retrieve: GET /auth/api/verification/{challenge_id}/
- auth_api_verify_create: POST /auth/api/verify/

## Query hooks (server state; keys come only from the key factory)
- useAuditLog (query) → auditLog
- useCancelDelayedChange (mutation) → changeDelayedCancel
- useCapabilities (query) → capabilities
- useConfirmSession (mutation) → confirmSession
- useDelayedChangeStatus (query) → changeDelayedStatus
- useDisableTotp (mutation) → totpDisable
- useLogout (mutation) → logout
- useMe (query) → me
- usePasskeys (query) → passkeys
- usePasswordMethods (query) → passwordMethods
- useRemovePasskey (mutation) → passkeyRemove
- useRevokeOtherSessions (mutation) → revokeOtherSessions
- useRevokeSession (mutation) → revokeSession
- useSecurityStatus (query) → securityStatus
- useSessions (query) → sessions
- useSsoLookup (query) → ssoLookup

## Errors (render t(code, params); UX from remediation)
114 keys (full catalog: manifest.json §errors). By remediation: fix_input 52 · retry 30 · reauthenticate 12 · wait_and_retry 8 · verify 7 · contact_support 5.
Param-bearing keys (interpolation slots matter):
- error.400.field.blank [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.does_not_exist [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.invalid [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.invalid_choice [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.max_length [400] → fix_input {field,max_length}
- error.400.field.max_value [400] → fix_input {field,max_value}
- error.400.field.min_length [400] → fix_input {field,min_length}
- error.400.field.min_value [400] → fix_input {field,min_value}
- error.400.field.null [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.required [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.unique [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.invalid_code_attempts [400] → fix_input {attempts_remaining}
- error.422.blocked [422] → wait_and_retry {retry_after_minutes}
- error.423.account_locked [423] → wait_and_retry {retry_after_minutes}
- error.429.rate_limit [429] → wait_and_retry {retry_after_minutes}

## Analytics events (typed; defineEvent → events.json, drift-gated)
- (no app defineEvent() in this pair — its analytic events are the
  auto-instrumented flow funnels below)

## Flow funnels (auto-instrumented: flow.<id>.<step> {phase})
- flow.auth.password_login.<step> — 3 documented step(s)
- flow.auth.passwordless_login.<step> — 4 documented step(s)
- flow.auth.step_up_verification.<step> — 7 documented step(s)

```tsx
// Typed event + tracked() click (the one right way; §3.1).
const planSelected = defineEvent({
  name: "pricing.plan.selected",
  description: "User picked a plan",
  props: { plan: prop.oneOf(["free", "pro", "team"], "Plan code") },
});
const { tracked } = useTracked();
<Button onClick={tracked(planSelected, { plan }, startCheckout)} />
// A click that STEPS a flow machine is already instrumented — mark it
// data-analytics="flow" instead; tracked() on top double-counts (§3.2).
```

## Demos (defineDemo → manifest.demos; compiled, linted, rendered examples)
- auth.anonymous-session → <AnonymousSession> [default]  demo/AnonymousSession.demo.tsx
- auth.authenticator-change → <AuthenticatorChange> [default]  demo/AuthenticatorChange.demo.tsx
- auth.magic-link → <MagicLink> [default]  demo/MagicLink.demo.tsx
- auth.passkey-login → <PasskeyLogin> [default]  demo/PasskeyLogin.demo.tsx
- auth.passkey-registration → <PasskeyRegistration> [default]  demo/PasskeyRegistration.demo.tsx
- auth.password-change → <PasswordChange> [default]  demo/PasswordChange.demo.tsx
- auth.password-login → <PasswordLogin> [default]  demo/PasswordLogin.demo.tsx
- auth.password-reset → <PasswordReset> [default]  demo/PasswordReset.demo.tsx
- auth.passwordless-login → <PasswordlessLogin> [default|locked]  demo/PasswordlessLogin.demo.tsx
- auth.qr-login → <QrLogin> [default]  demo/QrLogin.demo.tsx
- auth.sso-discovery → <SsoDiscovery> [default]  demo/SsoDiscovery.demo.tsx
- auth.totp-setup → <TotpSetup> [default]  demo/TotpSetup.demo.tsx
- auth.verification-challenge → <VerificationChallenge> [default]  demo/VerificationChallenge.demo.tsx
Each source file is the canonical usage snippet (open the default variant).

## Snippets
```tsx
// A flow machine drives state; you render each step.
const flow = createAnonymousFlow({ api: useAuthApi() });
const s = useFlow(flow.machine);
if (s.step.endsWith('Error')) return <p>{t(s.error.code, s.error.params)}</p>;
```
```tsx
// Error rendering + remediation branch (one pattern for every pair).
const r = explainAuthError(err.code); // 'wait_and_retry' | 'verify' | ...
return <Alert action={r}>{t(err.code, err.params)}</Alert>;
```
